title: ElytraFusion
description: A armor-utility plugin that allows players to fuse Chestplates with Elytras to create high-tier, protective flight-wear with customizable particle trails.
body:
# 🕊️ ElytraFusion
The ultimate "Late-Game" flight & protection solution.

ElytraFusion solves the age-old Minecraft dilemma: *"Do I wear my armor for protection, or my Elytra for mobility?"* Now, you can have both.

This plugin allows players to infuse any tier of Chestplate directly into an Elytra using a Smithing Table. The result is a high-performance flight-wear item that retains full defensive stats without sacrificing your ability to soar.

## ✨ Key Features

🛡️ **All Material Tiers** – Leather, Copper, Chainmail, Gold, Iron, Diamond, and Netherite infusions. Each tier can be enabled or disabled individually.

🔨 **Native Smithing** – Crafting uses the 1.20+ Smithing Table system for a seamless vanilla feel.

✨ **Dynamic Trails** – Unique, customizable particle effects that trail behind you based on your armor tier. Global on/off toggle and per-tier opt-out.

📜 **Enchantment Merging** – Automatically combines enchants (like Protection IV and Mending) from both items.

🏷️ **Custom Name Carry-Over** – Named your Elytra? The fused result keeps it by default. Configurable.

🔄 **Reversible Fusion** – Players can split a fused Elytra back into the exact original Elytra and Chestplate with `/ef split`, guarded by a clickable chat confirmation. Works on older fusions too with a best-effort fallback.

💬 **Fully Configurable** – Adjust armor values, toughness, durability, particles, and every player-facing message via `config.yml`. Supports `&` color codes and `{placeholders}`.

🧩 **Safe Updates** – Drop in a new `.jar` without deleting your config. Missing keys fall back to packaged defaults at runtime, and a `config-latest.yml` reference is only generated when something new is available.

## 🛠️ How it Works

**The Fusion:** Place a Smithing Template, an Elytra, and your Chestplate into a Smithing Table.

**The Result:** You receive an Infused Elytra that grants the specific armor points of the chestplate used — plus its enchantments and (optionally) its name.

**The Maintenance:** Repair your gear in an Anvil using the base material (e.g., use Diamonds to repair Diamond Infused Elytras).

**The Split (optional):** Changed your mind? Hold the fused Elytra and run `/ef split` — confirm in chat and get your original items back.

## 💻 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| *(Smithing Table fusion)* | Fuse an Elytra with any Chestplate | `elytrafusion.use` *(default: true)* |
| `/ef split` | Split a fused Elytra back into its original items (with confirm prompt) | `elytrafusion.split` *(default: true)* |
| `/ef give <player> <tier>` | Instantly give an infused elytra | `elytrafusion.admin` *(default: op)* |
| `/ef reload` | Reload config settings instantly | `elytrafusion.admin` *(default: op)* |

> 💡 **Tip:** Because `elytrafusion.use` is a real permission, you can use LuckPerms contexts to restrict fusing to specific worlds, regions, or ranks — e.g. allow fusing only at spawn, or only for donators.

## 💬 Support & Suggestions

Need help? Have a cool idea for a new feature? Join our community!

🗨️ [Discord](https://discord.gg/e2Pb4hfQah)

## 📊 Statistics

We use bStats to collect anonymous usage data to help improve the plugin. You can view our public metrics on the bStats dashboard!
